sourceCode: readNextRecord	| record |	record := self recordClassNew: fieldCount.	fieldAccessors		ifNil: [ self readNextRecordWithoutFieldAccessors: record ]		ifNotNil: [ self readNextRecordWithFieldAccessors: record ].	self handleEndOfRecord.	^ record

new: sizeRequested	"Return a new instance with the number of indexable variables specified by the argument."	^ self == String		ifTrue: [ ByteString new: sizeRequested ]		ifFalse: [ self basicNew: sizeRequested ]

copyFrom: start to: stop	"Answer a copy of a subset of the receiver, starting from element at	index start until element at index stop."	| newSize |	newSize := stop - start + 1.	^(self species new: newSize)		replaceFrom: 1		to: newSize		with: self		startingAt: start
